summary: 3-Tier RBAC Hierarchy and Admin Panel Features fully verified. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Login page shows only 3 demo buttons (no User), Admin Panel displays Quick Stats, Activity Timeline, Search, Role Filter, Export CSV. Hierarchy enforcement working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - existing issue from previous iteration

critical_code_review_comments: 3-Tier Hierarchy correctly enforced: Super Admin -> Admin only, Admin -> Advertiser only
Legacy 'user' role data exists in DB but new 'user' creation correctly blocked (422 validation error)
Admin Panel QuickStats component correctly shows role-based stats
Activity Timeline pulls from audit_logs collection appropriately
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests are automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-tier RBAC hierarchy fully implemented. Super Admin can ONLY create Admins (cannot create advertisers directly). Admin can ONLY create Advertisers (cannot create admins). User role removed from system (validation error if attempted). New endpoints: /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/activity-timeline, /api/admin/users/search, /api/admin/users/export, /api/admin/advertiser/{id}/dashboard-data, /api/admin/admin/{id}/dashboard-data all working.

3_tier_hierarchy.super_admin_creates_admin_only: VERIFIED - Creates admin successfully, fails with 403 for advertiser
3_tier_hierarchy.admin_creates_advertiser_only: VERIFIED - Creates advertiser successfully, fails with 403 for admin

new_endpoints.GET /api/admin/stats: VERIFIED - Returns total_admins, total_advertisers, total_campaigns, active_campaigns, total_creatives
new_endpoints.GET /api/admin/users/search: VERIFIED - Supports q (query) and role filter parameters
new_endpoints.GET /api/admin/users/export: VERIFIED - Returns CSV file with proper headers
new_endpoints.GET /api/admin/advertiser/{id}/dashboard: VERIFIED - Returns advertiser stats, campaigns, creatives
new_endpoints.GET /api/admin/admin/{id}/dashboard-data: VERIFIED - Super Admin only, returns admin stats and their advertisers

frontend_login_page.3_demo_buttons: VERIFIED - Shows Advertiser, Admin, Super Admin buttons in row

frontend_admin_panel.quick_stats_super_admin: VERIFIED - Shows 5 cards: Total Admins, Advertisers, Campaigns, Active, Creatives
frontend_admin_panel.quick_stats_admin: VERIFIED - Shows 4 cards: Advertisers, Campaigns, Active, Creatives (no Total Admins)
frontend_admin_panel.activity_timeline: VERIFIED - Sidebar shows recent activities with actor name and time
frontend_admin_panel.search_input: VERIFIED - Search input field with data-testid='search-users-input'
frontend_admin_panel.role_filter: VERIFIED - Dropdown with All Roles, Admin, Advertiser options (Super Admin only)
frontend_admin_panel.export_csv_button: VERIFIED - Download icon button with data-testid='export-csv-btn'
frontend_admin_panel.create_button_label_superadmin: VERIFIED - Shows 'Add Admin' for Super Admin

tab_visibility.super_admin_tabs: VERIFIED - All Users, Hierarchy, Access, Audit, Security
